channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AirPods 4 vs. Pro 2: Is the newer model worth it?
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy compares the AirPods 4 and the AirPods Pro 2. "For me, audio quality is the most essential factor in buying new headphones or earbuds," Kurt says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: I love a good bargain and these 7 appliances are under AU$100 ahead of Prime Big Deal Days
item.description: Early October Prime Day discounts see handheld steamers, kettles and more get discounts of up to 51% off.
item.dc:creator: sharmishta.sarkar@futurenet.com (Sharmishta Sarkar), TechRadar

item.title: How to remotely fix family computer woes
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores how you can help troubleshoot a computer issue remotely on Windows or a Mac. There are a variety of options.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Using your Apple Watch to monitor blood pressure
item.description: Checking your blood pressure has become simple with the Apple Watch, and doing this can help you identify trends and manage medications.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI-powered transcription leaks workplace secrets
item.description: Alex Bilzerian shared on X that the Otter AI platform shared confidential information, The Washington Post first reported.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Node.js previews network inspection support
item.description: Node.js v20.18.0, a just-introduced update to the Long-Term Support (LTS) version of the popular asynchronous, event-driven JavaScript runtime, features experimental network inspection support. Introduced October 3, Node.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Navigating the federal AI frontier: Top priorities for incoming chief AI officers
item.description: There are ten key focus areas for current and prospective agency CAIOs to consider to ensure and maximize the benefits and minimize the risks of AI. The post Navigating the federal AI frontier: Top priorities for incoming chief AI officers first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: NSA’s Kristina Walter on exposing ‘sophisticated’ cyber adversaries
item.description: The Cybersecurity Collaboration Center director pursues whole-of-government approach to helping agencies and industry tackle global cyberthreats. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: NSA’s Kristina Walter on exposing ‘sophisticated’ cyber adversaries first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Google says it will stop linking to New Zealand news if a law passes forcing it to pay for content
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Google said Friday it will stop linking to New Zealand news content and will reverse its support of local media outlets if the government passes a law forcing tech companies to pay for articles displayed on their platforms.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What to do when your IT provider vanishes
item.description: In the ever-changing tech landscape, service interruptions and company disappearances are more common than CIOs would like. Sometimes a provider proposes a solution based on technology that swiftly becomes obsolete, or just can’t move fast enough when a more promising solution emerges.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The creepy yet helpful humanoid robot ready to move into your home
item.description: A robot that stands more than 5 feet tall and weighs 66 pounds is well-equipped for household tasks, like carrying up to 44 pounds during its run time of two to four hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google's search engine's latest AI injection will answer voiced questions about video and photos
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is injecting its search engine with more artificial intelligence that will enable people to voice questions about images and occasionally organize an entire page of results, despite the technology's past misadventures with misleading information.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: The US and Microsoft disrupt a Russian hacking group targeting American officials and nonprofits
item.description: U.S. authorities and Microsoft say hackers linked to Russian intelligence targeted dozens of former military and intelligence officials, journalists and civil society groups with a sophisticated campaign designed to steal information.
item.dc:creator: David Klepper, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OpenAI demands investors shun rivals such as Anthropic, Elon Musk’s xAI
item.description: OpenAI has raised $6.6 billion from investors like Thrive Capital and Tiger Global, but the AI company also sought assurances that investors would avoid funding five competing firms, according to a Reuters report.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tres cosas que hay que hacer bien en la gestión de datos para proyectos de IA generativa
item.description: Según Kari Briski, vicepresidente de Modelos, Software y Servicios de IA en Nvidia, implementar con éxito la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa depende de la gestión eficaz de los datos y de evaluar cómo los diferentes modelos trabajan juntos para servir a un caso de uso específico.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Windows 11: A guide to the updates
item.description: A Windows launch isn’t the end a process — it’s really just the beginning. Microsoft continually works on improving Windows 11 by fixing bugs, releasing security patches, and occasionally adding new features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: ChatGPT maker OpenAI raises $6.6 billion in fresh funding as it moves away from its nonprofit roots
item.description: OpenAI says it has raised $6.6 billion in venture capital investments as part of a broader shift by the ChatGPT maker away from its nonprofit roots.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: CISA’s Jeff Greene on challenging the status quo
item.description: The new executive assistant director for cybersecurity at CISA details how sharing threat intelligence more broadly pays off. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: CISA’s Jeff Greene on challenging the status quo first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: DoD agencies confront zero trust challenges, misunderstandings ahead of 2026 deadline
item.description: The Defense Department’s zero trust framework is acting as a catalyst, driving mission owners to industry in search of zero trust solutions The post DoD agencies confront zero trust challenges, misunderstandings ahead of 2026 deadline first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft unveils new AI-powered Windows 11 features for Copilot+ PC users
item.description: Microsoft on Tuesday unveiled the latest AI features for Copilot+ PCs, with improved Windows search and a tool that can detect and act on the contents of a user’s screen.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google just made a major ChromeOS misstep
item.description: Did you ever watch the early 2000s TV series Scrubs? The show revolved around a young doctor named JD who always meant well but often got lost in his own head and ended up making ill-advised decisions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rise of Regional Cloud Providers: Alternative to Big Public Clouds?
item.description: Regional cloud providers emerging as alternatives to big public clouds, offering data sovereignty and agility in meeting local needs
item.dc:creator: Info World
